titleStmt.title: SII 10.376: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 376. (A.R. No. 769 of 1922.) ON A STONE BUILT INTO THE BACK WALL OF THE TEMPLE OF CHENNAKĒŚAVASVĀMI, NĀYANIPALLI, BAPATLA TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT. Year unknown.

summary.p: States that, in the course of his conquest of the South, king Gaṇapatidēva protected the king of Nellūru having killed his enemies Paḍihāri Bayyana, Tikkana and others, that he vanquished (?) Kulōttuṅga Rājēndra Chōḍa of Draviḷa maṇḍala, that he received presents (?) of elephants from the king of Nellūru, that he saved the Bhṛiṅgi maṭha on the Śrīparvata and that he consecrated the image of Kumāra Gaṇapēśvaramahādēva after his own name in • • palli. The concluding portion is missing.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śasti sahitaṁ
hāmaṁḍalēśvarakāka
patidēvamahārājulu
vijayamusēsi para
maṁḍaḷamulu sādhi
ṁcci dakṣiṇadigubhāgamu
na nellūru gāṁci tadvirōdhu
laina paḍihāri bayyanatikka
nala verasina śātravaśiraṁ
bulaṁgaṁdukakrīḍāvinō
damu salipidraviḷamaṁ
ḍaḷamuna kulōttuṁgarājē
ṁdracōḍani koni nellū
rirājucēta [Ēnu]ṁgulaṁ santhi
goni vacci guḍi tisi śrīpa
¨rvvatamuna si la sureśa
nāthadēvara saṁtānamu bhṛṁgimaṭhamu ra
kṣiṁcci caitravuramainava palliṁ da
napēraṁ gumāragaṇapēśvaraśrīmahādēvara
pratiṣṭhasēyumu dānki mu
lost
Note:—Some lines at the top and one at the bottom are lost.
Digital edition of SII 10.376 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
